parameters.query:
-- FY Revenue recalculation: aggregate allocated_revenue from active capture plans
INSERT INTO gda_mega_cache (id, payload, extracted_at)
SELECT
  1,
  jsonb_set(
    COALESCE((SELECT payload::jsonb FROM gda_mega_cache WHERE id = 1), '{}'::jsonb),
    '{fy_revenue}',
    (SELECT jsonb_build_object(
      'total_allocated_m', ROUND(SUM((plan_data->>'allocated_revenue')::numeric) FILTER (WHERE plan_data->>'allocated_revenue' IS NOT NULL), 2),
      'pursue_count', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE o.gda_label = 'PURSUE'),
      'evaluate_count', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE o.gda_label = 'EVALUATE'),
      'recalculated_at', to_char(NOW(), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
    )
    FROM gda_capture_plans cp
    JOIN gda_opportunity_tracker o ON o.id = cp.opp_id
    WHERE o.stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go','Lost'))
  )::text,
  NOW()
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE
  SET payload = EXCLUDED.payload,
      extracted_at = EXCLUDED.extracted_at
RETURNING id, extracted_at;
